mvp.highlights: 34.3 PPG, 12.8 RPG, 3.3 SPG — dominated on both ends of the floor

dpoy.highlights: 1.75 SPG, 11.0 RPG — dominant rebounder with active hands on the league's best defense

sixthMan.highlights: 3.8 PPG, 2.5 RPG — reliable contributor off the bench every game

finalsMvp.highlights: 40 pts, 19 reb, 5 ast, 4 stl — led Team Nathan to the Season 1 title

playoffMvp.highlights: 45 pts in Play-In, triple-double (22/13/10) in the Championship — dominated across 3 playoff games
